concept: Perform / The Open Path of Generative Presence
description: The act of presenting an artistic work to an audience. It is the embodied, mindful act of bringing a creative piece to life in a shared, present moment.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'phe' (generative action), 'ma' (grounded presence), and 'loa' (path, way). The word's structure means 'the path of generative, grounded presence.' This frames performance as a mindful, embodied journey that unfolds in the present moment for the benefit of the collective.
